name: Snot
description: '''Edy Junior Edouard''' (born December 16, 1997), known professionally as '''SNOT''' (stylized as '''$NOT'''), is an American singer-songwriter and rapper. Born in New York City, he moved to [[Lake Worth Beach, Florida]] at seven years old, where he would begin his rap career through [[SoundCloud]] in 2016. Edouard rose to prominence with his song "Gosha", which received a [[Music recording certification|platinum]] certification by the [[Recording Industry Association of America]] (RIAA). The following year, SNOT released his second studio album, ''Beautiful Havoc'' (2020).
